heading: Remove a PagerDuty Integration
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To delete a third-party integration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas integrations delete <integrationType> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas integrations delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-delete).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To remove the PagerDuty integration from your Atlas project using the Atlas UI, click **Remove** on the PagerDuty
card in your Atlas project's **Project Integrations**.
